---
name: Feature Request / 功能请求
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement / 建议新功能或改进
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / 问题

Describe the problem this feature would solve. / 描述此功能要解决的问题。

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

Describe your proposed solution. / 描述你建议的方案。

## Affected Domain / 涉及域

Which domain(s) does this affect? / 涉及哪个域？

- [ ] core - SignalField / DomainStore / EventBus
- [ ] communication - Pheromones / Channels / Stigmergy
- [ ] intelligence - Memory / Identity / Social
- [ ] orchestration - Planning / Adaptation / Scheduling
- [ ] quality - Gate / Resilience / Analysis
- [ ] observe - Dashboard / Metrics / Health
- [ ] bridge - Tools / Hooks / Session

## Alternatives Considered / 考虑过的替代方案

Any alternative solutions you've considered. / 你考虑过的替代方案。
